description: A Conjunction Data Message (CDM) predicts that the 'EarthObs' satellite will pass dangerously close (~150m) to 'CosmosDebris' exactly 24 hours from epoch. Design a Debris Avoidance Maneuver (DAM) for the 'EarthObs' satellite by modifying the GMAT script at ~/Documents/missions/dam_analysis.script. The maneuver must be applied exactly 12 hours after epoch (ElapsedSecs = 43200). Achieve a final miss distance of at least 2.0 km at the Time of Closest Approach (TCA) with a total Delta-V magnitude not exceeding 1.0 m/s. Do not modify the initial orbital parameters of EarthObs or CosmosDebris. Save the script and write a
